title: Big Take: Private Credit Meets Buy Now, Pay Later (Podcast)
title_cn: 大观点：私人信贷与“先买后付”的结合（播客）
summary: Two opaque corners of finance have joined forces: shadow banking and phantom debt. Put another way, private credit firms are backing Buy-Now-Pay-Later companies to finance their expansion into the US consumer market. On today’s Big Take podcast, guest host Stacey Vanek Smith joins Bloomberg reporters J.J. McCorvey and René Ismail to discuss what private credit’s involvement in BNPL means for everyday borrowers, why it’s raising concerns and whether the risks hiding in these spaces could spill ov

summary: Hedge funds turned the most negative on the yen since 2007 as the currency trades near its weakest level in four decades.

title: Asian Stocks Set to Gain After Tech-Powered Rally: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲股市将在科技股推动的反弹后上涨：市场结束
summary: Stocks in Asia are poised to edge higher after a rally in several US technology giants revived confidence that the AI-driven bull market still has room to run.

title: Oil Holds Drop as Saudi Arabian Price Cut Amplifies Glut Concern
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯降价加剧了供过于求的担忧，油价持续下跌
summary: Oil held a drop on signs of growing global oversupply, with Saudi Arabia slashing prices of its main grade to Asia and maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz picking up.

title: Japan Drives Asia Offshore Bonds to Record, Surpassing China Era
title_cn: 日本推动亚洲离岸债券创历史新高，超越中国时代
summary: Japanese borrowers drove quarterly issuance in Asia Pacific’s offshore bond market to a record, eclipsing the previous peak set during an era of Chinese corporate dominance.

title: Hamilton Lane Raises $3.8 Billion Fund Targeting Mid-Market Private Equity Deals
title_cn: Hamilton Lane 筹集 38 亿美元基金瞄准中端市场私募股权交易
summary: Erik Hirsch, Co-CEO at Hamilton Lane, discussed the firm's recent $3.8 billion fundraise aimed at co-investing alongside private equity in mid-market companies. Hirsch emphasized the focus on smaller and mid-sized firms that are typically too small to pursue public offerings, highlighting that significant returns in private markets often come from these less visible segments. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lone Pine Gains 43% in First Half on Long and Short Bets
title_cn: Lone Pine 上半年多空押注上涨 43%
summary: Lone Pine Capital posted a 43% gain for its hedge fund investors through June, notching one of its best-ever starts to a year and landing it among 2026’s top performers.

title: Welltower Raises C$1.15 Billion From Canadian Bond Sale
title_cn: Welltower 通过加拿大债券发行筹集 11.5 亿加元
summary: Welltower Inc. has raised C$1.15 billion ($809 million) in a two-part bond deal, becoming the latest US firm to tap investors north of the border.

title: Tech Stocks Extend Rally Ahead of Samsung Earnings, SK Hynix IPO
title_cn: 科技股在三星财报和 SK 海力士 IPO 之前延续涨势
summary: US stocks climbed on Monday as investors jumped on technology shares after the blistering artificial-intelligence trade wavered heading into the holiday weekend.

title: How to Get the Most Out of Your Kid’s Trump Account
title_cn: 如何充分利用孩子的特朗普账户
summary: Families with young kids can officially start putting money in a Trump Account as of July 4, 2026. But is this account right for you and your kid's savings goals and needs? Sarah Foster explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Push Higher Led by Chipmakers | Closing Bell
title_cn: 芯片制造商带动股市走高结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Emily Graffeo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: KKR’s Private Credit Clients Slow Down Their Redemption Requests
title_cn: KKR 的私人信贷客户放慢了赎回请求
summary: Investors in a KKR & Co. retail private credit fund got back all of their requested cash in the second quarter, a sign that individual investors’ skittishness over the asset class may be easing.

title: Tech Giants Drive Stock Gains in AI Trade Revival: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 科技巨头在人工智能贸易复苏中推动股市上涨：市场总结
summary: A rally in several technology giants lifted stocks amid speculation that the artificial-intelligence trade that has powered the bull market has more room to run.

title: Traders Are Most Positive on Dollar Since 2015 as Fed Hike Looms
title_cn: 随着美联储加息的临近，交易者对美元最为乐观，自 2015 年以来
summary: Global traders have turned the most positive on the outlook for the dollar since 2015 as bets that borrowing costs will remain elevated for longer have fueled a monthlong rally in the US currency.

title: Hertz Bears Boost Short Bets to Record After Shares Sink 60%
title_cn: 赫兹股价下跌 60% 空头空头押注创历史新高
summary: Short sellers are anticipating more pain ahead for Hertz Global Holdings Inc. after the stock plummeted almost 60% in less than two weeks.

title: Tether’s Former CIO Plans Sale of Stake in Stablecoin Giant
title_cn: Tether 前首席信息官计划出售稳定币巨头的股份
summary: Richard Heathcote, who until earlier this year oversaw stablecoin giant Tether Holdings SA’s investment portfolio, is planning to sell a small stake in the company, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Broadcom, Apple Extend Chips Partnership to 2031
title_cn: Broadcom 与 A​​pple 将芯片合作伙伴关系延长至 2031 年
summary: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman said that despite ups and downs for Apple and Broadcom's partnership to build out AI servers is expected to last for multiple generations of Apple products. Gurman said that relationship is mutually beneficial as Apple needed Broadcom to help build out the technology and Apple remains Broadcom's biggest growth driver and revenue source.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ETF IQ 7/6/2026
title_cn: ETF IQ 2026 年 7 月 6 日
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: State Street Investment Management Chief Business Officer Anna Paglia, Heft ETF Co-Portfolio Manager Neil Howe, and  E Fund Management Assistant head of Global Index Sylvia Zhang. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ardian’s Santé Cie Seeks to Enter Mandat Ad Hoc Process
title_cn: Ardian 的 Health Cie 寻求进入强制性临时程序
summary: Santé Cie SAS is seeking to enter French debt renegotiation proceedings after some of its cash assets were seized as part of an investigation from the authorities into alleged corruption and money laundering.

title: Oil Slides to Fresh Five-Month Low as Oversupply Signals Mount
title_cn: 随着供应过剩信号加剧，油价跌至五个月新低
summary: Oil slid to fresh five-month lows as Saudi Arabia made the biggest cut to its flagship crude prices in at least 26 years, the latest sign of a glut in global markets.

title: Saudis Slash Main Oil Price to Rare Discount
title_cn: 沙特将主要石油价格下调至罕见折扣
summary: Ellen Wald, president of Transversal Consulting and Author of 'Saudi, Inc.,' said that Saudi state oil producer Saudi Aramco is lowering the price of oil to make it worthwhile for Asian buyers to charter a tanker to go into the Strait of Hormuz and to buy up stores of oil that have laid stagnant during the war.  Wald said that while Saudi Aramco made money off of the conflict in Iran, they want the keep oil prices stable.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: High AI Capex Demand a 'Multi-Year' Cycle, Says Rudina Seseri
title_cn: Rudina Seseri 表示，高人工智能资本支出需要“多年”周期
summary: Rudina Seseri, founder and managing partner at Glasswing Ventures, said that she is seeing strong overall demand for AI infrastructure and doesn't see AI capex falling as companies turn toward becoming vertically integrated players in the AI business. Seseri, who was joined by Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow, said that she sees future demand lying in more specialized data sets for industries rather than wide ranging data.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aluminum Gains Despite Goldman Warning of Faster Supply Rebound
title_cn: 尽管高盛警告供应将加速反弹，铝价仍上涨
summary: Aluminum rose from near a four-month low, even as Goldman Sachs Group Inc. warned that supply from Middle Eastern smelters is rebounding more quickly than expected.

title: Distressed Funds Explore Swap of Strategy Holdings Amid Rout
title_cn: 陷入困境的基金在惨败中探索战略持股互换
summary: Distressed-debt funds that snapped up Strategy Inc.’s beaten-down preferred shares are in talks with one of the company’s bankers about swapping them for other securities, pitching it as a win-win as the relentless rout in crypto puts the Bitcoin accumulator in an increasingly tough spot.

title: Gold Falls as Traders Assess Fed Rate Outlook Ahead of Minutes
title_cn: 由于交易员在会议纪要前评估美联储利率前景，金价下跌
summary: Gold dropped as traders weighed the outlook for the Federal Reserve’s interest rate path at the start of a week in which the minutes of the US central bank’s last meeting are expected to shed light on policymakers’ thinking.

title: I Don't Expect The Fed To Hike In July Says Lavorgna
title_cn: 拉沃尔尼亚表示我预计美联储不会在 7 月加息
summary: President Donald Trump rang the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq from the Oval Office to mark the launch of Trump Accounts, a new investment vehicle for children. Joe Lavorgna, Chief Economist of SMBC Americas joins to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Zealand Set to Raise Key Rate, Decision Less of a Slam Dunk
title_cn: 新西兰将提高关键利率，决策不是灌篮高手
summary: New Zealand’s central bank is poised to raise its key interest rate this week, most economists and traders reckon, beginning a gradual unwinding of stimulus as it aims to head off emerging inflationary pressures.

title: Trump Is Not a Man Who Plays By The Rules, Says Daalder
title_cn: 达尔德表示，特朗普不是一个遵守规则的人
summary: Ivo Daalder, former US Ambassador to NATO under President Barack Obama, joined Balance of Power to discuss the the upcoming NATO meeting in Turkey. Daalder said the best outcome from the NATO summit this week is "that the alliance lives another day." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Private Credit is Fueling the Buy-Now-Pay-Later Boom
title_cn: 私人信贷如何推动“先买后付”热潮
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, we track how private credit is funding the Buy-Now-Pay-Later boom, what it means for borrowers and why the relationship is raising red flags. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk-Altman Judge Sends OpenAI Battle to Mediator
title_cn: 马斯克-奥特曼法官将 OpenAI 之战发送给调解员
summary: The judge overseeing the legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman and their dueling AI startups enlisted a mediator to resolve the dispute.

title: Business Development Companies Face Pressure but Not All Are Impacted Equally
title_cn: 业务发展公司面临压力，但并非所有公司都受到同样的影响
summary: Shares of business development companies (BDCs) have experienced significant pressure in the first half of the year, with Bloomberg Intelligence data showing a median return decline of about 7%, marking the weakest performance since 2022. Randy Schummer, Vice Chair and Chief Investment Strategist at Churchill Asset Management, addressed these concerns on the program, emphasizing that not all BDCs should be viewed the same way. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley Adviser Discusses Sustainability of Earnings Growth Amid Market Rally
title_cn: 摩根士丹利顾问讨论市场反弹期间盈利增长的可持续性
summary: Katerina Simonetti, Executive Director at Morgan Stanley Private Wealth Management, discusses the ongoing market rally, emphasizing that it is supported not just by multiple expansion but also by relatively healthy earnings. She highlighted the key question facing investors: whether earnings growth can continue into the second half of the year and if this growth will be uniform across sectors or show signs of divergence. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Drone Maker Ondas Says the 'Arms Race' Has Started
title_cn: 无人机制造商昂达斯称“军备竞赛”已经开始
summary: Ondas, which develops drones and secures wireless communications, has agreed to buy autonomous aircraft maker DZYNE Technologies in a cash-and-stock deal worth over $875 million, which will turn Ondas into a full-service autonomous defense technology platform. Ondas Chairman and CEO Eric Brock joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple, Broadcom Expand Custom Chip Partnership | Bloomberg Tech 7/06/2026
title_cn: 苹果与博通扩大定制芯片合作伙伴关系彭博科技 7/06/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down Apple's big bet on Broadcom for the future, extending its custom chip partnership through 2031. Plus, Microsoft eyes a massive reorganization of its Xbox unit with plans to eliminate 20% of its staff over the next year, and SK Hynix begins marketing its US listing with plans to sell roughly $28 billion in American depositary receipts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Runway Expands Global AI Footprint
title_cn: Runway 扩大全球人工智能足迹
summary: Runway is going global, with the AI video company opening new hubs in London, Tokyo, and Paris, and plans to invest nearly $300 million over the next few years as it scales its business and AI research. Runway co-founder and CEO Cristóbal Valenzuela joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple, Broadcom Extend Chip Deal to 2031
title_cn: 苹果与博通将芯片交易延长至 2031 年
summary: Broadcom will provide new custom chips to Apple in an expanded partnership that now runs through 2031. The companies will partner on ASIC silicon, which will be found in “multiple generations of Apple products,” according to a Broadcom filing. Bloomberg's Consumer Tech and Apple Managing Editor Mark Gurman joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RBC's Janet Mui Sees Semiconductor Stock Pullback as Healthy Consolidation
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行 (RBC) 的珍妮特·梅 (Janet Mui) 将半导体股票回调视为健康整合
summary: Janet Mui, Head of Market Analysis at RBC Brewin Dolphin, discussed the recent pullback in semiconductor stocks, characterizing it as a healthy consolidation following a strong rally rather than the beginning of a broad market reversal. She emphasized that the fundamental demand for semiconductors continues to far outstrip supply, supporting ongoing investor interest. Despite occasional market jitters triggered by news events, such as developments in the cloud computing sector, Mui highlighted that the underlying fundamentals remain robust. This strength has led to a rebound in chip stocks after the recent US holiday, with investors taking advantage of price dips during consolidation phases. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft’s Xbox to Cut 3,200 Jobs, Divest Studios in Overhaul
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 将裁员 3,200 人并剥离工作室进行全面改革
summary:
Microsoft Corp.’s Xbox plans to eliminate 3,200 jobs, or around 20% of its staff over the next year, as part of a massive reorganization to spur growth in the struggling gaming division. Xbox will also divest four of its video-game development studios and is beginning the process to part ways with a fifth.
“Our business today is not healthy,” Chief Executive Officer Asha Sharma wrote in a note to staff Monday morning, adding that Xbox is operating at margins three to 10 times lower than comparable businesses. “We must reset Xbox.”
Brody Ford, Bloomberg Technology Reporter, joined Bloomberg's Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu to talk about Microsoft's XBox layoffs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ondas to Buy Military Drone Maker DZYNE for $875.8 Million
title_cn: Ondas 以 8.758 亿美元收购军用无人机制造商 DZYNE
summary: Ondas Inc. agreed to buy autonomous aircraft maker DZYNE Technologies in an $875.8 million cash-and stock-deal that positions Ondas as a full-service autonomous defense technology platform.

title: Tech Drives Stock Gains in AI Trade Resurgence
title_cn: 人工智能贸易复苏，科技推动股市上涨
summary:
A rally in several technology powerhouses lifted stocks amid speculation that the artificial-intelligence trade that has powered the bull market has more room to run. 
The advance halted a two-day rout in chipmakers, with traders betting the industry’s investment boom will continue to support solid earnings.
Shana Sissel, founder and CEO at Banríon Capital Management, joined Bloomberg's Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu to discuss her outlook for tech stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WEF Founder Schwab Claims He Found Spying Device at His Home
title_cn: WEF创始人施瓦布声称他在家中发现了间谍设备
summary: World Economic Forum founder Klaus Schwab has filed a criminal complaint following the alleged discovery of a secret listening device planted in his home office in Geneva.

title: Tepper’s Appaloosa Soars 32% in First Half on Memory-Chip Makers
title_cn: 存储芯片制造商推动泰珀阿帕卢萨上半年股价飙升 32%
summary: David Tepper’s Appaloosa Management returned 32% in the first half of the year, fueled by bets on the high-flying memory-chip sector.

title: Nvidia Server Delay Report Sends Asian Tech Stocks Sliding
title_cn: 英伟达服务器延迟报告导致亚洲科技股下滑
summary: Asian technology stocks slumped after a report that Nvidia Corp.’s next-generation AI server rack system has been delayed by more than a year due to manufacturing difficulties.

title: AI Job Disruption Has Come for Ireland's Technology Sector
title_cn: 人工智能对爱尔兰科技行业的就业造成干扰
summary: The country benefited from a jobs boom after attracting US multinationals, but some of these roles are being cut in the name of AI efficiency.

title: Memory Chipmaker SK Hynix Kicks Off $28 Billion US Listing
title_cn: 存储芯片制造商 SK Hynix 启动 280 亿美元美国上市
summary: SK Hynix Inc. kicked off the formal marketing process for its US listing on Monday, as the South Korean chipmaker looks to capitalize on surging investor demand for the high-flying memory-chip sector.

title: Chip Stocks Rally in AI Trade Revival After Plunge
title_cn: 暴跌后，芯片股在人工智能贸易复苏中反弹
summary:
A rebound in chipmakers lifted stocks as dip buyers emerged amid speculation that the artificial-intelligence trade that has powered the bull market has more room to run.
Lori Calvasina, Head of US Equity Strategy at RBC Capital Markets, discusses AI influence on the broader market and stronger earnings driving stock upside. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft’s Xbox to Cut 3,200 Jobs, Divest Five Studios in Major Overhaul
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 将裁员 3,200 人，并剥离 5 个工作室进行重大改革
summary: Compulsion and Double Fine studios will become independent; Undead Labs and Ninja Theory will be sold. Xbox will also look to sell or spin out Arkane Studios.

title: Broadcom, Apple Extend Tie-Up to 2031 With New Custom Chips
title_cn: Broadcom 与 A​​pple 通过新型定制芯片将合作关系延长至 2031 年
summary: Broadcom Inc. said that it will provide new custom chips to Apple Inc. in an expanded partnership that now runs through 2031.

title: Microsoft’s Xbox to Cut 3,200 Jobs as Part of Massive Reorganization
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 将裁员 3,200 人，作为大规模重组的一部分
summary: Microsoft Corp.'s Xbox plans to eliminate 3,200 jobs, or around 20% of its staff over the next year, as part of a massive reorganization to spur growth in the struggling gaming division. Jason Schreier reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Novartis Buys Cancer-Drug Firm Myricx for Up to $1.5 Billion
title_cn: 诺华 (Novartis) 以 15 亿美元收购癌症药物公司 Myricx
summary: Novartis AG agreed to buy British biotech Myricx Bio for as much as $1.5 billion, adding an experimental cancer drug designed to deliver more potent treatments directly to tumors while limiting damage to healthy cells.

title: HSBC's Kettner Says `Melt-Up' Set to Boost Hyperscalers
title_cn: 汇丰银行的凯特纳表示，“熔化”将推动超大规模企业发展
summary: Max Kettner, chief multi-asset strategist at HSBC, says the ``melt-up'' moment in tech stocks is set to swing momentum back to the hyperscalers. He speaks on Bloomberg Television's ``Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jobs Report Won't Sway Fed That Much, Berro Says
title_cn: 贝罗表示，就业报告不会对美联储产生太大影响
summary: Kelsey Berro, Fixed Income Portfolio Manager at JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the Federal Reserve's monetary policy outlook, indicating that a rate hike in July is probably off the table and she expects the Fed to stay on hold for the year. Berro also says while the recent payrolls report suggests the labor market is stable, it's not going to decisively influence Fed decisions. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mike Wilson Sees Semiconductor Stocks Correcting
title_cn: 迈克·威尔逊（Mike Wilson）认为半导体股票正在调整
summary: Morgan Stanley Chief US Equity Strategist Mike Wilson says investors are rotating out of some of the year's biggest winning technology trades. He says hyperscalers will stabilize and semiconductors stocks will correct. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amundi Says European Industrials to Benefit From AI Boom
title_cn: Amundi 表示欧洲工业将受益于人工智能热潮
summary: Amundi Investment Institute Head Monica Defend explains where she sees value in the AI supply chain. "Industrial is going to be a key sector because of its weight on on the market and because this is the sector where we have the AI enablers," Defend tells Bloomberg Television. "This is where we think the value and the performance might come from." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe’s Equity Bankers Bet on Capex Wave to Ride Out IPO Slump
title_cn: 欧洲股票银行家押注资本支出浪潮能渡过IPO低迷期
summary: Record spending on AI infrastructure and power grids is fueling a flurry of capital raises by listed companies, giving bankers one of their busiest starts in years and eclipsing the slowdown of initial public offerings in the region.

title: Reddit Is Cracking Down on AI Marketing Slop With Its Own AI
title_cn: Reddit 正在利用自己的人工智能来打击人工智能营销失范
summary: Reddit Inc. is battling a new kind of spam: stealth marketing content created by brands that want to get mentioned by popular artificial intelligence chatbots like ChatGPT and Gemini.

title: Tencent Seeks to Sell Up to $1.6 Billion Stake in Kuaishou
title_cn: 腾讯拟出售最多 16 亿美元的快手股份
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is seeking to raise as much as $1.55 billion in a selldown of part of its stake in short-video app operator Kuaishou Technology through a block trade.

title: Platner Pressured to End Senate Bid After New Assault Allegation
title_cn: 普拉特纳在新的袭击指控后被迫终止参议院竞选
summary: Maine Democrat Graham Platner said in a social media video he would reflect on “the best path forward” in his US Senate campaign as pressure mounts within the party for him to end his bid following a sexual assault allegation.

title: Macron Becomes First EU Leader to Visit Syria Since Assad’s Fall
title_cn: 马克龙成为阿萨德倒台后第一位访问叙利亚的欧盟领导人
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron is on a two-day visit to Syria, making him the first European Union leader to visit the war-torn country since the fall of the Assad regime in late 2024.

title: Peru Nominates 20-Year Central Bank Chief Velarde for New Term
title_cn: 秘鲁提名新任中央银行行长维拉德 任期20年
summary: Peru’s central bank chief Julio Velarde, seen as a pillar of economic stability in the politically volatile Andean nation, has agreed to stay on for another term, likely extending one of the world’s longest tenures at the helm of a monetary authority.

title: Trump Says Walmart Is Lowering Some Prices at His Request
title_cn: 特朗普称沃尔玛应他的要求降低部分价格
summary: President Donald Trump said Walmart Inc. agreed to lower prices for some products and he urged other retailers to follow suit, touting the move as a boon to US consumers.

title: Robinhood CEO Sees 'Tremendous' Uptake for Trump Accounts
title_cn: Robinhood 首席执行官认为特朗普账户的使用量“巨大”
summary: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev says Trump Accounts are a "no-brainer" for new parents and also good for anyone under the age of 18. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Tenev also comments on the future of perpetual futures. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Influence Extends to Even World Cup Decisions
title_cn: 特朗普的影响力甚至延伸到了世界杯的决定上
summary: It doesn’t help FIFA’s credibility that the organization won’t explain its reversal.

title: US Chief Design Officer on Launch of Trump Accounts Site
title_cn: 美国首席设计官谈特朗普账户网站的推出
summary: US Chief Design Officer Joe Gebbia, co-founder of Airbnb, discusses the design and benefits of the Trump Accounts site and app on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Boosts Powers on State-Linked Attacks With Fast-Tracked Law
title_cn: 英国通过快速法律增强打击与国家有关的攻击的权力
summary: The UK Parliament passed a new law giving the government more power to crack down on groups linked to hostile foreign states.

title: Outgoing Leader Says Colombia’s Next Government Is Illegitimate
title_cn: 即将卸任的领导人称哥伦比亚下一届政府不合法
summary: Colombia’s outgoing leader said he doesn’t recognize the legitimacy of the incoming government of President-elect Abelardo de la Espriella, escalating tension as the nation prepares for a transfer of power on Aug. 7.

title: Michigan Democrats Clash Over Party’s Future in Senate Race
title_cn: 密歇根州民主党在参议院竞选中就党的未来发生冲突
summary: Michigan’s Democratic Senate primary is transforming into a pivotal clash between progressives and moderates after a series of wins for left-leaning candidates in other states rattled the party’s establishment.

title: SK Hynix Moves to Capitalize on Memory Chip Demand | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 7/6/2026
title_cn: SK 海力士采取行动充分利用存储芯片需求 |彭博商业周刊日报 7/6/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg Economics chief economist Tom Orlik discusses how long rates could feel the impact of Trump's war with Iran. Then, Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow breaks down the latest tech headlines as South Korean memory chipmaker SK Hynix makes official moves towards a US listing. Plus, Rudina Seseri, founder and managing partner at Glasswing Ventures, dives deeper into where the AI trade is headed as industries home in on specific AI innovation and integration. Finally, Ellen Wald, president of Transversal Consulting and Author of 'Saudi, Inc.,' discusses Saudi state oil producer Saudi Aramco's move to make big reductions to its main crude oil price for buyers in Asia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Headed to NATO Summit | Balance of Power 7/6/2026
title_cn: 特朗普前往北约峰会|权力平衡 7/6/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Trump Administration. On today's show, former US Ambassador to NATO Ivo Daalder, BGR Group Principal Lester Munson, Vantage Global Media Founder Jamie Jackson and SMBC Americas Chief Economist Joe Lavorgna. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Bitcoin Reserve Faces Hurdles as Departments Seek Control
title_cn: 随着各部门寻求控制，特朗普比特币储备面临障碍
summary: The Trump administration’s plan to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve has been complicated by two government departments vying to run it, alongside questions about which has the legal authority to do so.

title: Trump Rings Wall Street Opening Bell, Hails Trump Accounts
title_cn: 特朗普敲响华尔街开市钟，赞扬特朗普账目
summary: President Donald Trump rang the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq from the Oval Office, a celebratory event to mark the launch of Trump Accounts, a new investment vehicle for children.

title: Cuba Suffers National Blackout as US Fuel Blockade Drags On
title_cn: 由于美国燃料封锁的持续，古巴遭受全国停电
summary: Cuba’s electric grid suffered a total collapse Monday as the nation struggles with crumbling infrastructure and a de facto US oil blockade that has pushed the communist-run island to the brink.

title: Fed’s Waller Says ‘Forward Guidance’ Needs to Be Flexible
title_cn: 美联储沃勒表示“前瞻指引”需要灵活
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller said signals from policymakers on the future path of interest rates can play a useful role if done carefully.

title: Burnham Camp Split on Cost-of-Living Plan as He Approaches Power
title_cn: 伯纳姆营在接近权力时就生活费用计划产生分歧
summary: Andy Burnham, Britain’s likely next prime minister, faces competing advice from within his own camp on how to respond to the UK’s cost-of-living crisis, as he rushes to finalize his plans for government ahead of a Labour Party’s leadership contest he’s set to win.

title: Trump Says He Expects to Host China’s Xi in US Around Sept. 24
title_cn: 特朗普表示，他预计将于 9 月 24 日左右在美国接待中国习近平
summary: US President Donald Trump said he expected to meet with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping around Sept. 24, which would coincide with the UN General Assembly in New York that month.

title: German Defense Spending to Climb to Third of Budget by 2030
title_cn: 到 2030 年，德国国防支出将攀升至预算的三分之一
summary: Germany will ramp up spending on defense and security to more than €200 billion ($228 billion) by the end of the decade, amounting to a third of the federal budget as Europe’s No. 1 economy pushes to rearm.

title: Trump Says He Asked FIFA For Balogun Red Card Review (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普称他要求国际足联进行巴洛贡红牌审查（问答）
summary: President Trump said that he asked FIFA to review the red card on Team USA top scorer Folarin Balogun because he didn't believe it was a foul. The controversial red card was suspended and Balogun is expected to play in the US's round of 16 game against Belgium. Trump maintained he had nothing to do with decision to reverse the red card, telling reporters that he only said he thought it should be reviewed because Balogun 'didn’t do anything wrong.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Midterms 'Playbook is Affordability' Says Henrietta Treyz
title_cn: 亨利埃塔·特雷兹 (Henrietta Treyz) 表示，中期选举的“剧本是负担能力”
summary:
Americans hit the peak of the summer driving season this July 4 holiday weekend wincing at the cost of gasoline.
Henrietta Treyz, Co-Founder at Veda Partners, discusses the US political landscape for the second half of 2026 as affordability remains a top concern for voters. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Plans for an Urban Super City
title_cn: 中国的超级城市计划
summary: China’s Greater Bay Area will fuse 11 cities into a megalopolis that includes Hong Kong, which Beijing hopes will become a new Silicon Valley. But the plan is part of a much larger transformation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Business Secretary Says Burnham Will Keep Industrial Strategy
title_cn: 英国商务大臣表示伯纳姆将维持产业战略
summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle said the governing Labour Party’s industrial strategy will survive its looming change of leadership, arguing Keir Starmer’s likely successor, Andy Burnham, was “already committed” to the policy.

title: Trump Rings Opening Bell in Oval Office to Tout Trump Accounts
title_cn: 特朗普在椭圆形办公室敲响开门钟，吹捧特朗普的账目
summary: President Trump said that Trump Accounts for children will contribute to the 'biggest boom of all' for the US economy as he rang the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the NASDAQ from the Oval Office Monday morning to celebrate the launch of the program.  The tax-advantaged accounts, which are available to US citizens under 18, include a government contributed $1,000 for children born in Trump's second term. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Asked FIFA To Review Red Card Given to Balogun
title_cn: 特朗普称他要求国际足联审查给予巴洛贡的红牌
summary: President Donald Trump says he did ask FIFA chief Gianni Infantino to review the red card given to US soccer star Folarin Balogun. Trump says the striker did not commit a foul against Bosnia and Herzegovina. “All I did, I asked for a review, because I didn’t think it was a foul. And, you know, again, I’m good at this stuff. I didn’t think it was a foul. I thought it was two great athletes that crashed into each other and got entangled,” Trump told reporters Monday in the Oval Office. FIFA overturned the suspension of Balogun, who is now allowed to play in the Monday night match against Belgium. (Corrects spelling of Folarin) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rutte Cautions of 'Limit' to Interceptors in US, Europe
title_cn: 吕特警告美国和欧洲对拦截机的“限制”
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte says there is "a limit to the amount of interceptors" in the alliance. "That's why we need to make sure that we produce more," he adds. Rutte speaks to reporters in Ankara ahead of the NATO summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Chief Says Allies Face Limits on Air Defenses for Ukraine
title_cn: 北约秘书长称盟国在乌克兰防空方面面临限制
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte cautioned that allies don’t have an endless supply of missile interceptors, hours after Ukraine implored the military alliance to send more to repel Russia’s deadly air strikes.

title: Trump Says Generous Donors Help Fund Trump Accounts
title_cn: 特朗普表示慷慨的捐助者帮助为特朗普账户提供资金
summary: President Donald Trump holds an event in the Oval Office to mark the launch of Trump Accounts, a new investment vehicle for children. Michael and Susan Dell, who made a $6.25 billion donation to support the program, and other executives were on hand. Trump says many companies are "putting up a lot of money." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Asked for Red Card Review, FIFA Made Right Move
title_cn: 特朗普称国际足联在要求红牌审查时做出了正确的举动
summary: President Donald Trump said he called FIFA chief Gianni Infantino to review the case of US star Folarin Balogun, claiming the striker had not committed a foul deserving a red card and defending the organization’s decision to overturn the suspension.

title: Trump Accounts Risk Missing Low-Income Families Buying In
title_cn: 特朗普的账户可能会错过低收入家庭的购买机会
summary: The Trump administration is touting its tax-advantaged investment accounts for those under 18, but critics say the accounts may only reach those who are already set in life.
